questions.question: Describe Peterson's solution to the critical section problem. What are its limitations?
questions.hint: Peterson's solution uses a flag to ensure exclusive access to a critical section. However, it doesn't handle the case when both processes are waiting on the same flag.

questions.question: Explain how Peterson's solution handles the waiting problem in the critical section problem?
questions.hint: Peterson's solution uses a flag to indicate whether a process is waiting at the critical section. When a process is waiting, it checks the flag periodically.

questions.question: What are the conditions under which Peterson's solution will deadlock?
questions.hint: Peterson's solution will deadlock if both processes are waiting on the same flag, and both flags are set to 1.
